title: The Straw Hats Meet Elbaf’s Danger
description: On pages 4–6, this part follows Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Zoro, Unknown person #6 as Elbaf’s present-day danger converges on the Straw Hats, Loki, and the giants as the island’s history and World Government pressure collide.
scene: Elbaf’s present-day danger converges on the Straw Hats, Loki, and the giants as the island’s history and World Government pressure collide.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: It's impossible! We've been friends forever!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We've been buddies for a long time. And you never change...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Whenever you ask for "Just one bite"...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You always go and eat half of it!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: That fatal strike was a real beauty!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Don't worry about a thing, guys!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Is it me, or do they seem giddy about this?

summary: This part advances Elbaf’s Crisis Reaches the Straw Hats through 28 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
